description: 151 Super Maintenance Spray is the ideal multi-purpose maintenance aid that dispels moisture, lubricates, penetrates, cleans and protects metals from corrosion and has thousands of uses around the workshop and garden. It is designed to dispel moisture from car and motorcycle electrics. Use on battery terminals to prevent corrosion, on leads and inside distributor caps to remove and protect against moisture.
